name: cloudplatformfeed-security-headers
description: Apply security response headers to all routes

Content-Security-Policy.value: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'none'; object-src 'none'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: https://*.ytimg.com; style-src 'self'; manifest-src 'self'; worker-src 'self'; media-src 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests
